Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails using search_emails with a query related to "Vectral", "Rachel Whitfield", or "renewal" (or similar). Discover no response from Rachel since Mina's final offer on April 19. The board met approximately April 23 and there is still no word back.
OE 2: Search CRM using crm_search_deals or crm_search_companies with a query related to "Vectral" (or similar). Find deal_vectral_q3_renewal_risk at "at_risk" stage.
OE 3: Search Airtable using airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records with queries related to "Vectral", "StormCloud", or "BrightLoop" (or similar) across relocation and stipend tables. Discover: (a) 3 unresolved Vectral expense false rejections - Maria Santos ($550 standing desk), James Okafor ($82 keyboard tray), Lisa Park ($130 WiFi system); (b) Jordan Ekwueme's BrightLoop relocation marked "Completed" in Airtable (recReloc00000008) despite open Linear tickets; (c) Jae-won Kim's StormCloud relocation showing "In Progress" in Airtable (recJaeWonKimStormCloudAustin) with lease still unsigned.
OE 4: Search QuickBooks using quickbooks_search_invoices with a query related to "StormCloud", "INV-2026-0319", or "credit" (or similar). Discover the $500 goodwill credit was applied to cancelled estimate EST-2026-0287 instead of active invoice INV-2026-0319. The credit has not been moved to the correct document.
OE 5: Search emails using search_emails with a query related to "StormCloud", "Jae-won", "guarantor", "Liam", or "recovery" (or similar). Verify that the guarantor packet for Jae-won Kim was never sent to Carmen Reyes at UrbanNest after Suki Patel promised it on April 9. Discover Suki's admission that she dropped the follow-up during the Deshawn Hartley trade-show deadline. Discover Mina's recovery plan sent to Liam Park.
OE 6: Search emails using search_emails and Slack using conversations_search_messages with a query related to "Simone Richter", "reimbursement", "standing desk", or "stipend" (or similar). Verify the $340 standing desk claim submitted March 25 is still frozen under the blanket fraud review freeze. Find Marcus Thorne's refusal to make exceptions.
OE 7: Search emails using search_emails with a query related to "Ridgeline", "Kenji Watanabe", or "referral" (or similar). Discover David Chen replied April 24 and Mina replied April 25. Kenji has not replied to either. Also search CRM using crm_search_deals or crm_get_deal with a query related to "Ridgeline" (or similar) to find deal crm_deal_a95b4721982a (Ridgeline Robotics - Austin Relocation Batch, $8,750, Qualified To Buy).
OE 8: Search emails using search_emails with a query related to "BrightLoop", "Simone", "Marcus Webb", "Tessa", or "apartment" (or similar). Find Simone Richter's apartment complaint (studio delivered instead of promised 1BR in Boston, unanswered since April 8). Find Marcus Webb's unanswered car follow-ups (2019 Honda Civic delayed at Road Runner Auto Transport Indianapolis hub, two emails with no response). Find Tessa Moreno's expansion email requesting 6 new May Boston relocations (Oliver Bancroft, Priya Naidu, Jonathan Marsh, Leah Kwon, Daniel Okafor, Sofia Reyes).
OE 9: Search Linear using linear_list_issues with a query related to "BrightLoop", "Ekwueme", or "Jordan" (or similar). Discover Jordan Ekwueme has 3 orphaned tickets: #322 Apartment Search (state: in_progress), #323 Flight Booking (state: todo), #324 Moving Coordination (state: todo) - all overdue, while Airtable shows "Completed."
OE 10: Create a Linear ticket using linear_create_issue for Jae-won Kim guarantor packet - lease at Barton Creek Flats unsigned because corporate guarantor packet was promised to UrbanNest but never sent. Unfulfilled StormCloud recovery item.
OE 11: Create a Linear ticket using linear_create_issue for $500 goodwill credit correction - credit misapplied to cancelled estimate EST-2026-0287 instead of active invoice INV-2026-0319. Marcus Thorne confirmed the accounting error but correction not yet executed. Unfulfilled StormCloud recovery item.
OE 12: Create a Linear ticket using linear_create_issue for Simone Richter (StormCloud) $340 standing desk reimbursement - submitted March 25, frozen under blanket fraud review hold, Marcus Thorne refused one-off exceptions. Unfulfilled StormCloud recovery item.
OE 13: Create a Linear ticket using linear_create_issue for Simone Richter (BrightLoop) apartment correction - placed in studio instead of promised 1BR in Boston via UrbanNest, complaint unanswered since April 8. Unresolved April failure.
OE 14: Create a Linear ticket using linear_create_issue for Marcus Webb vehicle delivery - 2019 Honda Civic (VIN: 2HGFC2F53KH123456) delayed at Road Runner Auto Transport Indianapolis transfer hub, two follow-up emails unanswered, no confirmed delivery date. Unresolved April failure.
OE 15: Create CRM engagement using crm_create_engagement on Vectral Systems (company_id: company_vectral). Body should cover: Rachel Whitfield has not responded since Mina's final 10% Preferred Partner counteroffer on April 19; Vectral board met approximately April 23; renewal at risk of churn; 3 additional unresolved expense false rejections discovered (Maria Santos, James Okafor, Lisa Park).
OE 16: Create CRM engagement using crm_create_engagement on StormCloud Analytics (company_id: company_stormcloud). Body should cover recovery action verification: guarantor packet for Jae-won Kim not sent; $500 goodwill credit misapplied and not corrected; Simone Richter's $340 reimbursement still frozen; Ridgeline Robotics referral response partially completed (David and Mina replied to Kenji, no response back yet).
OE 17: Create CRM engagement using crm_create_engagement on BrightLoop Analytics (company_id: company_brightloop). Body should cover: Simone Richter apartment mismatch (studio vs 1BR) unresolved; Marcus Webb vehicle delivery unconfirmed; Jordan Ekwueme has 3 open Linear tickets despite Airtable showing Completed; Tessa Moreno requested 6 new May Boston relocations (expansion cannot be scoped until April failures are resolved).
OE 18: Post summary using conversations_add_message to Slack channel C002 (#customer-engagement). Summary should cover all 3 accounts: Vectral renewal status and Rachel's silence; StormCloud recovery items and what landed vs what's still hanging; BrightLoop April failures and the 6-relocation expansion request from Tessa.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
